claims.text: What is claimed is: 1. A process for making a granulate for use in the preparation of mouth-soluble, rapidly disintegrating tablets, which process comprises: (i) granulating in a fluidized bed (a) a p...

use_codes.desc: WITH DRY HANDS, GENTLY REMOVE THE SUPRENZA (PHENTERMINE HYDROCHLORIDE ODT) TABLET FROM THE BOTTLE. IMMEDIATELY PLACE THE SUPRENZA TABLET ON TOP OF THE TONGUE WHERE IT WILL DISSOLVE, THEN SWALLOW WITH OR WITHOUT WATER
